The first part is the integration layer, then the agentic platform, and then the security experts.
So our founders, the ones that have actually built Daylight, were the first product and the first engineer in Torque, which is a very known security automation company.
They have learned from the first day that in order to give good service, you need to integrate to a customer environment.
That was their foundation.
When they started building Daylight, they wanted a system that can really integrate and integrate well, not just, you know, another checkmark, but really understand the environment of the system.
And they've actually built a system that we are able to add new integration with AI.

The system also learns the environment and improves the integration as you go.
And therefore, it's really easy to integrate.
We can do it within an hour.
We can integrate a customer with more than 15 different systems because it was built for that.

And just one thing, I'm just really, I think this is really important.
The third part is not services, it's security experts.

across.
